backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the backend, implementing user profile management, video upload, commenting, and subscription features with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and blob storage via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs and titles to their implementing frontend files, related components, and test IDs for features like ReelsPage snap-scrolling, ReelCard sidebar actions, tab switcher, and VideoPlayerPage theatre mode.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose, key props, and notable implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, chart colors, etc.) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Mediatube app, loading the Google Identity Services script and mounting the React app via /src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes, wraps the app in QueryClientProvider, ThemeProvider, GoogleAuthProvider, and LanguageProvider, and renders the Layout with an Outlet.
frontend/src/components/AddToPlaylistBut: A button component that opens a popover allowing authenticated users to add or remove a video from their playlists, and create new playlists inline.
frontend/src/components/AdOverlay.tsx: Video ad overlay component that displays a banner ad with a countdown timer, shows a skip button after 5 seconds, and auto-dismisses after 15 seconds, calling onSkip or onComplete callbacks accordingly.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: A mobile-only fixed bottom navigation bar with links to Home, Shorts, Upload, Subscriptions, and Profile, highlighting the active route.
frontend/src/components/CameraRecordingM: A full-featured camera recording modal supporting filters, zoom, music selection, timer/duration options, and mic selection for recording short videos.
Displays a list of comments for a video and provides an authenticated input form to submit new comments.
frontend/src/components/CommunityPostCar: Renders a single community post card with author info, timestamp, optional image attachment, and a delete option for the post owner.
frontend/src/components/CommunityPostCom: A form component for authenticated users to create community posts with optional image attachments, including upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/EditProfileModal: A modal dialog component that allows authenticated users to edit their channel name, handle, and description, with validation and submission via the useUpdateUserProfile hook.
frontend/src/components/FilterSelector.t: A horizontally scrollable filter bar component that renders selectable filter buttons based on a predefined FILTERS/FILTER_ORDER config, highlighting the currently selected filter.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: A dropdown menu component that lets users switch the app's display language from a list of seven supported languages using the LanguageContext.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout component providing a sidebar with navigation, a top bar with search/voice search/auth controls, and a profile setup modal trigger for new users authenticated via Internet Identity or Google.
frontend/src/components/MusicPickerPanel: A bottom sheet panel that displays a music library allowing users to preview and select a background music track (or none) for their content, managing audio playback via a ref.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A one-time onboarding dialog for new users to set their channel name, handle, and description, pre-filling name from Google auth if available and saving via useSaveCallerUserProfile.
frontend/src/components/RecommendedVideo: Renders a sidebar list of recommended video thumbnails and metadata (excluding the current video), with skeleton loading states, using per-video uploader profile lookups.
frontend/src/components/ReelCard.tsx: A full-screen reel/short video card component that handles autoplay, mute toggling, like interactions, subscribe actions, progress tracking, and displays uploader profile info with a comments drawer.
frontend/src/components/ReelCommentsDraw: A bottom-sheet drawer component for displaying and submitting comments on a reel, fetching comments and user profiles, and auto-scrolling to the latest comment.
frontend/src/components/ShareButton.tsx: A share button component that copies a video's URL to the clipboard using the modern Clipboard API with a legacy execCommand fallback, showing a tooltip and copied confirmation state.
A subscribe/unsubscribe button component that checks the current user's subscription status to a channel principal and toggles it, with loading and unauthenticated states.
frontend/src/components/TrendingVideos.t: A horizontally scrollable trending videos section that displays the top 10 non-short videos with rank badges, duration, view counts, and skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/components/VideoCard.tsx: A video card component that renders a thumbnail preview, duration badge, channel avatar, title, view count, and optional subscribe button, linking to either the video page or reels.
frontend/src/components/VideoPlayer.tsx: A full-featured React video player component supporting play/pause, volume, seek, fullscreen, chapters, playback speed, end screen with countdown, and recommended videos.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: React context provider that manages the user's preferred UI language, persisting the selection to localStorage and supporting 7 language codes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddComment.ts: Mutation hook that calls the backend to add a comment to a video and invalidates the comments query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddVideoToPlaylist: Mutation hook that adds a video to a playlist via the backend actor and invalidates related playlist query caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminRemoveVideo.t: Mutation hook that removes a video via the admin backend method and invalidates admin dashboard and all-videos caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCameraRecorder.ts: Hook that manages camera/microphone access, MediaRecorder-based video recording, audio device enumeration, facing mode switching, elapsed time tracking, and recorded blob/URL lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateApiKey.ts: Mutation hook that creates a new API key via the backend actor and invalidates the API keys query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateCommunityPos: Mutation hook that creates a community post with an optional attachment and invalidates the community posts cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreatePlaylist.ts: Mutation hook that creates a new playlist with a title and description and invalidates the playlists cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteCommunityPos: Mutation hook that deletes a community post by ID and invalidates both global and channel-scoped community post caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeletePlaylist.ts: Mutation hook that deletes a playlist by ID and invalidates the playlists query cache on success.
Query hook that fetches admin dashboard data, enabled only when the actor is ready and the user is authenticated.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllVideos.ts: Query hook that fetches all videos from the backend actor, refetching on window focus.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetApiKeys.ts: Query hook that fetches the authenticated user's API keys, enabled only when the actor is ready and the user is authenticated.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Query hook that fetches the current caller's user profile from the backend, returning combined loading and fetched state.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetChannelVideos.t: Query hook that fetches all videos belonging to a specific channel principal.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCommentCount.ts: Query hook that fetches the comment count for a given video ID, returning it as a number.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetComments.ts: Query hook that fetches all comments for a given video ID from the backend.
Query hook that fetches all community posts and returns them sorted newest-first.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCommunityPostsB: Query hook that fetches community posts for a specific channel principal, sorted newest-first.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetMonetizationSta: Query hook that fetches monetization statistics for the authenticated user, enabled only when identity is present.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetPlaylistById.ts: Query hook that fetches a single playlist by ID, returning null if the ID is absent.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetPlaylistsByOwne: React Query hook that fetches all playlists owned by the currently authenticated Internet Identity user.
Query hook that fetches the list of videos belonging to a specific playlist ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetSubscribedReels: React Query hook that fetches short video reels from channels the authenticated user is subscribed to.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetSubscribers.ts: React Query hook that fetches the list of subscriber principals for a given channel principal.
React Query hook that fetches trending videos from the backend actor, with window focus refetch disabled.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetUserProfile.ts: React Query hook that fetches a user profile for a given principal, returning null if unavailable.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetVideo.ts: React Query hook that fetches metadata for a single video by its ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useGoogleAuth.ts: Provides a GoogleAuthProvider context and hook for Google Sign-In via the GSI client, persisting the parsed JWT user to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useIncrementViewCount: React Query mutation hook that increments the view count for a video and invalidates related queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsCallerAdmin.ts: React Query hook that checks whether the currently authenticated caller has admin privileges on the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useMusicMixer.ts: Hook that mixes a background music track with a video blob's audio using the Web Audio API, returning a WAV blob and exposing mixing progress state.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemoveVideoFromPla: React Query mutation hook that removes a video from a playlist and invalidates playlist-related queries, showing toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/hooks/useRevokeApiKey.ts: React Query mutation hook that revokes an API key via the backend actor and invalidates the API keys query cache.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook that saves the caller's user profile to the backend and invalidates the current user profile cache.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearchVideos.ts: React Query hook that searches for videos by a search term, only querying when the term is non-empty.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetProfileImage.ts: React Query mutation hook that updates the caller's profile avatar by fetching the current profile and saving it with new image bytes.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubscribeToChannel: Provides two React Query mutation hooks, useSubscribeToChannel and useUnsubscribeFromChannel, for managing channel subscriptions and invalidating subscriber cache.
React Query mutation hook that updates the authenticated user's profile fields (name, description, handle, avatar) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useUploadVideo.ts: React Query mutation hook that uploads a video file to the backend with optional progress tracking, returning the new video ID on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useVideoFilter.ts: React hook that creates a canvas-based filtered MediaStream from a video element, supporting CSS filters and zoom (1.0–3.0) via drawImage cropping at ~30fps.
frontend/src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts: React hook that wraps the Web Speech API to provide voice-to-text search functionality, exposing listening state, transcript, error messages, and start/stop controls.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Defines a multilingual translation map (at least English and Spanish) covering all UI strings for navigation, auth, search, community, and other app features.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet that defines dark-theme CSS custom properties for the app's design system, including YouTube-style tokens and Mediatube brand gradient utilities.
frontend/src/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the Vite app, loading the Google Identity Services script and mounting the React app via the #root div.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before rendering into the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page that displays platform stats, a list of users, and videos with the ability to remove videos, gated behind an admin role check via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/pages/ApiKeysPage.tsx: Page for managing API keys, allowing authenticated users to create labeled keys, view/copy/toggle visibility of existing keys, and revoke them via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/ChannelPage.tsx: Displays a channel profile page with tabs for videos, playlists, community posts, and subscriber info, fetching all data via React Query hooks using the channel's principal ID.
frontend/src/pages/CommunityPage.tsx: Renders a community feed page with a post composer and a list of community post cards, showing skeletons while loading and an empty state if no posts exist.
frontend/src/pages/CopyrightPolicyPage.t: Static page displaying Mediatube's copyright policy, including content ownership rules and the DMCA takedown process, with breadcrumb navigation and i18n support.
frontend/src/pages/DownloadAppPage.tsx: Marketing page for downloading the Mediatube mobile app, featuring a hero banner, app feature highlights, screenshots, and download buttons for Android and iOS.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main home page showing a filterable category chip bar and a responsive grid of non-short videos fetched via a custom hook, with skeleton loading and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/MonetizationPage.tsx: Authenticated dashboard page displaying a creator's monetization stats (earnings, revenue) with loading skeletons, error handling, and a refresh button.
frontend/src/pages/PlaylistDetailPage.ts: Displays a single playlist's details and its videos, allowing the owner to remove individual videos or delete the entire playlist via confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/PlaylistsPage.tsx: Shows all playlists owned by the authenticated user in a grid, with a dialog to create new playlists; redirects unauthenticated users to a sign-in prompt.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Renders the authenticated user's profile page with avatar upload, channel stats, and tabbed views for videos and community posts, supporting both Internet Identity and Google auth.
frontend/src/pages/ReelsPage.tsx: Full-screen vertical reels viewer with 'For You' and 'Following' tabs, using IntersectionObserver to track the active reel as the user scrolls.
frontend/src/pages/SearchResultsPage.tsx: Displays video search results for a query string taken from URL search params, showing a loading skeleton, empty state, or a grid of VideoCard components.
frontend/src/pages/ShortsPage.tsx: Lists all short videos (under 60 seconds) in a responsive grid, filtered from all videos, with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/pages/SubscriptionsPage.tsx: Displays a grid of videos from channels the authenticated user subscribes to, fetched via actor queries, with loading skeletons and unauthenticated/empty states.
frontend/src/pages/UploadVideoPage.tsx: Provides a form for authenticated users to upload videos with title, description, short toggle, camera recording, and optional background music mixing before submitting.
frontend/src/pages/VideoPlayerPage.tsx: Renders a full video player page with chapter parsing, view count incrementing, uploader profile display, theatre mode toggle, and a recommended videos sidebar.
frontend/src/types/filters.ts: Defines TypeScript types and a configuration map for seven CSS-based video filters (normal, beauty, vivid, B&W, warm, cool, vintage) with display names and icons.
frontend/src/types/music.ts: Defines the MusicTrack interface and exports a static MUSIC_LIBRARY array of five royalty-free background music tracks with metadata and asset URLs.
frontend/src/utils/avatarHelpers.ts: Provides two utilities: converting a Uint8Array image blob to a base64 data URL with MIME-type detection, and generating initials from a display name.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Exports helper functions to format view counts (K/M suffixes), nanosecond timestamps into relative time strings, and seconds into HH:MM:SS duration strings.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and removing sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with YouTube-style and Mediatube brand color tokens, Shadcn semantic colors, Roboto font, glow shadows, and accordion/fade-in animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 3) for a social media app with Internet Identity auth and video reels features, listing existing features, architectural notes, and known issues.
